acceptance_targets: [chapter_10_F001] Pass if the revised bar scene anchored around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:85 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:163 has three distinct observable turns on the page: Marco establishes affectionate shared history, Nate extracts at least one usable fact by steering or mirroring, and Marco briefly notices a gap before the scene moves on. Fail if the middle of the scene still contains anecdote beats that only reassert 'Marco remembers / Nate doesn't' without adding a new fact, a sharper suspicion beat, or a changed social temperature.

[chapter_10_F002] Pass if the revised ending after snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:620 reaches the chapter close through one concrete notebook failure and at most one concise explicit realization that Nate cannot close the gap. Fail if the passage both states the notebook's grotesque function around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:603 and then separately re-explains, in fresh abstract phrasing near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:642 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:646, that a whole life is too dense to memorize.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised bar scene anchored around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:85 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:163 has three distinct observable turns on the page: Marco establishes affectionate shared history, Nate extracts at least one usable fact by steering or mirroring, and Marco briefly notices a gap before the scene moves on. Fail if the middle of the scene still contains anecdote beats that only reassert 'Marco remembers / Nate doesn't' without adding a new fact, a sharper suspicion beat, or a changed social temperature.
findings.evidence: After the bluffing pattern is established, the bar scene keeps buying more anecdote-space without enough new turn: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:85, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:151.
findings.problem: The Marco sequence over-proves the same dramatic fact. Once the Montreal/Jessica material has shown Nate surviving on mimicry and indexing, the later run of college-story material mostly restates that Marco remembers and Nate does not. The sophomore-year correction is the one real escalation, but the scene spends too much time arriving there, which makes the chapter's concealment engine feel slightly programmatic rather than tightening continuously.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress and recombine the bar-scene beats beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:85, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:145, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:151. Keep Marco's warmth, one reusable fact-cluster Nate can carry forward, and one explicit near-catch, but trim anecdote material that does not change Nate's information, Marco's suspicion level, or the relationship pressure in the room.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised ending after snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:620 reaches the chapter close through one concrete notebook failure and at most one concise explicit realization that Nate cannot close the gap. Fail if the passage both states the notebook's grotesque function around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:603 and then separately re-explains, in fresh abstract phrasing near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:642 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:646, that a whole life is too dense to memorize.
findings.evidence: The notebook has already made the grotesque point before the closing reflection repeats it in more explanatory language: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:603, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:620, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:642, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:646.
findings.problem: The ending lands twice. By the time Nate realizes he is building 'a user manual for a dead man's life' and then fails to reconstruct Cape Cod from scraps, the chapter has already rendered the desperation and insufficiency concretely. The final explanatory paragraph restates that another person's life is too dense to learn fast enough, which blunts the last-page force instead of sharpening it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the closing sequence around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:603, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:620, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:642, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:646. Let the dossier pages and one final concrete insufficiency beat carry the realization. Keep the must-land state shift that Nate cannot become Dominic fast enough, but remove one layer of paraphrased thematic explanation once the notebook has already made that truth legible.

findings.acceptance_test: Read revised lines 3775 and 4109. Pass criteria: (1) 'He could feel' does not appear at line 3775. (2) 'Landed' does not appear as a metaphor at line 4109. (3) Both convey the same emotional beats through physical or sensory detail.
findings.problem: Chapter 10 contains two 'he could feel' instances (lines 3629, 3775) and one 'landed' narrator endorsement (line 4109: 'Yourself. The word landed and kept landing'). Line 3629 ('He could feel the office around him, the slow machinery of attention') is the better use because it has specific spatial content. Line 3775 ('He could feel each item slide around as soon as the next one arrived') is generic. The 'landed and kept landing' at line 4109 is the formula's most explicit form—a word that 'keeps landing' is narrator commentary on how effectively a word worked.
findings.rewrite_direction: Target: lines 3775 and 4109. Keep line 3629 (has spatial specificity). At line 3775, replace 'He could feel each item slide around' with a concrete image for memory instability—the bar, the noise, Marco's face, the accumulating names. At line 4109, replace 'The word landed and kept landing' with Nate's physical reaction to the word 'yourself'—what his face does, what his hands do, how the room changes for him. Do not use 'landed,' 'hit,' 'struck,' or 'sat.'

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: This novel's central premise involves consciousness murder, identity theft, sexual fraud, and the demolition of a working-class community for profit. It must not flinch from any of these. The sex scenes between Nate and Sarah must reckon with the fact that Sarah is being deceived about who is in the bed with her — this is not a comfortable situation and the prose should not make it comfortable. The grief scenes must be physically specific — no 'he was devastated,' only the concrete gestures and sensory details of a man watching his life's work get torn down. The guilt should live in Nate's body (Dominic's body), not in tidy moral reflections. When the novel is funny, it should be funny about things that are actually terrible — the comedy should never feel safe. When Nate discovers that Dominic was trying to help, the reader should feel sick, not enlightened. Risk specificity over tastefulness at every turn.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: Euphemism in place of specificity is a craft failure. When a scene requires difficult content — the moral weight of having killed an innocent man, the complicated ethics of sex under false identity, the physical reality of a man losing his livelihood, the specific humiliation of professional incompetence, the material texture of gambling debts and their enforcement — render it with the same care and specificity given to any other scene. The reader should feel the roughness of the situation, not a smoothed-over summary of it.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm for all characters. Uncontracted forms reserved for emphasis, deliberate formality, or Victor's professional register when delivering serious messages. If a line reads as stiff or literary, check whether contractions would make it sound spoken.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter energy aggressively. A comic workplace chapter should not be followed by another comic workplace chapter. A grief-heavy scene should be followed by something that lets the reader breathe — not through tonal whiplash but through a genuine shift in the kind of pressure being applied. Vary scene counts, dialogue-to-narration ratios, and temporal compression. Some chapters should cover hours; others should cover weeks. At least three chapters should contain extended quiet: meals, walks, conversations about nothing important. These are not filler — they are the human baseline that makes the high-pressure scenes land.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plain American English with a slightly elevated attention to physical specificity. Not minimalist — the prose has room for interiority and texture — but never ornate. Latinate vocabulary only when the concept demands it. Prefer the concrete noun over the abstract one, the specific tool name over the generic 'tool,' the actual menu item over 'food.' The prose should feel like a smart person thinking clearly, not a writer crafting sentences.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, limited to Nate. The camera sits inside Nate's skull — we see through his eyes, think in his rhythms, and register the world through his specific sensory and emotional biases. The narration should reflect Nate's intelligence and his limitations simultaneously: he notices things (sharp observer) but misinterprets them (blinded by resentment, guilt, and self-pity). The narrative should not explain things Nate wouldn't articulate and should not achieve insights Nate hasn't earned.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Varied sentence length with a center of gravity around 15-20 words. Short declaratives for landing beats. Longer, accumulative sentences for sensory description and interior processing. Avoid sustained staccato (more than three short sentences in sequence) and sustained lyricism (more than two long, clause-heavy sentences in sequence). The prose should breathe.
